title: Chemiosmosis Explained
script_summary: An engaging breakdown of chemiosmosis and its significance in energy production.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you energy production in cells is like a secret dance?
Enter chemiosmosis, the process powering ATP, your body's energy currency.
It all happens in mitochondria, where protons flow through a membrane, creating energy.
This movement generates a gradient, triggering ATP synthase to produce ATP.
Without chemiosmosis, no energy. No life as we know it.
Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow for more!
